review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Review only the provided diff. Never say you need to inspect files or run commands. Output the final verdict in the requested structure." --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-072-review-prompt.txt > /tmp/cp00-072-claude-review-output.json

findings.title: Fixture result payload was not validated end-to-end against the result assertion
findings.details: Claude observed that the fixture mirrors policy test spot-checked result flags but did not run the fixture result through assertControlPlanePermissionAuditSecondaryWorkflowGuardResult, which could allow future manual fixture drift to pass.
findings.recommendation: Add assert.equal(assertControlPlanePermissionAuditSecondaryWorkflowGuardResult(suiteFixture.result), true) to the fixture mirrors policy test.

residual_risks: Low. CP00-072 is metadata-only and forward-looking; runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ evaluator calls, security trimming, audit event writes, review queue writes, database/storage/idempotency/lock/product-state writes, and LDIP implementation remain explicitly prohibited.
The only review finding was non-blocking test-fixture hardening and was fixed before closeout.
parsed_review.overall_summary: CP00-072 ControlPlanePermissionAuditSecondaryWorkflowGuard covers the planned 10 Risk-A units RP00.P06.M04.S04-S13, consumes the CP00-071 secondary matrix boundary, binds secondary mutation/export-download/share/AI retrieval decisions plus audit hint, matched rule, deny-over-allow, legal hold, ethical wall, and object ACL interactions, and preserves no-write/fail-closed/LDIP-planning-only boundaries.

raw_result.result_excerpt: Verdict APPROVE. P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=1. Blocking findings none. Required fixes none. Residual risk low.
